title: Transparent UI (ClearUI)
body:
ever wanted to have transparent ui's in the game? No? Well, it's here anyway.
This texture pack makes every ui in the game transparent and the *MAIN* version**DOES NOT INCLUDE** 
1. inventory
2. containers
3. any ui that isn't a pause menu or something\
"Containers Edition" **does** have all of this
   
it also makes every disabled button invisible and enabled button blue!!!
